updateNote: Day 13 — Hezbollah-Iran joint operation: 200+ rockets, 20 drones, advanced ballistic missiles at Israel (largest combined attack of the war). IRGC claims 50+ targets struck. Iraq shuts oil ports after tanker attacks. Oil surges: Brent $95.79, WTI $94.73. Iran sets 3 peace conditions. Russia providing tactical drone advice to Iran. Israel threatens Lebanon national infrastructure. Kuwait intercepts 8 Iranian drones.
